title: 850 Pcs Pearl Stickers, Self Adhesive Back Stick on Pearls, Flat Back Pearls Sticker Sheets with Pick Up Tweezer, for Face Beauty Makeup Nail Art DIY (3/4/5/6mm), Mixed Colors
features: ✨High-Quality Material: Pearl Stickers for Crafts Are Smooth Polished, Round and Shiny, With a Smooth and Delicate Touch. Self Adhesive Pearls Are an Excellent Choice as an Accessory, Making You the Focus of the Crowd.

✨Package Content: You will get 825 pearl self-adhesive stickers with exquisite appearance and quality materials in different size, including 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm enough quantity and various size can to meet your various decorate needs.

✨Easy to Use: The adhesive on the back of the pearl gem stickers is strong, and the strong adhesion stays for a long time and is not easy to fall off. You can easily peel off the sticker and stick it where you want.

✨Wide Application: Adhesive Pearls for Crafts Can Not Only Decorate Nail Art, Gifts, Diaries and Mobile Phone Cases, but Also Can Decorate Mirrors, Photo Frames, Wardrobes, Etc. Add Luster to Your Life.
✨Note: The pearl stickers are small part, keep them far away from children to avert chocking; Make sure the place you want to stick is clean without any indent, dust and scratches.
description: Product Name: Pearl Rhinestone Sticker Colour: mixed colors Package includes: 825 x Pearl Bead Adhesive Stickers with Pick Up Tweezer Nail Art The mixed colors pearl's surface is glossy without scratches, oxidation-proof and dust-proof. They are easy to clean. Wedding Decor These pearl stickers are self-adhesive. The adhesive side is sticky and easy to stick on your crafts. Handmade Art Work They stick well on multiple surfaces including paper, plastic, wood, wall, skin and nails,easy to use.
